titleStmt.title: SII 16.97: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 97. (A.R. No. 542 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Āruḷāḷaperumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Jyēshṭha ba. 12, Thursday. The details regularly correspond to 1532 A.D., May 30, f.d.t. °66.

States that the king, having been crowned on Kārtika ba. 5 in the year Virōdhin, gave protection (abhayahasta-rāyasam) to Rāyaṇarāju of Nuggihaḷḷi and Mallurāya, Veṅkaṭādri and other pāḷegārs of Ummattūr who sought his asylum in subjection, uplifted the Manneyas, sent the Manneyas and Daḷavāyis to Tiruvaḍi-rājya and levied tribute from the Tiruvaḍi kings, took the daughter of the Pāṇḍya in marriage, set up a pillar of victory on the bank of Tāṁbraparṇi, subdued Tuṁbichchi-nāyaka and Sāḷuvanāyaka, and visited along with the queen Varadādēvamma and Komāra Venkaṭādri-Chikka-voḍeya, god Varadarāju and performed in the presence of the god the Tulāpurusha-dāna with pearls, the Mahābhūta-ghaṭa-dāna and the Sahasra-gōdāna and gave several jewels set with precious stones and rich silk clothes to the deities in addition to endowing several villages to the temple for worship and various offerings.

The Tamil and Kannaḍa versions of this record are engraved on the same wall in this temple and their texts are published in the South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. IV, No. 53 and Vol. IX, Nos. 547 and 548 respectively, the last two being exact copies, one in Kannaḍa and the other in Nāgarī characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . svasti śrīman®mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa mūru rāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkkara pū¨rvadakṣiṇapaścima samudrādhīśvara Accutarāyamahārāyalu pṛdhvirājyaṁśēya navadhariṁpagānu svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1454 Agunēṭi naṁdana saṁvatsara jēṣṭa ba 2 gu lu Accutarāyamahārāyalu virōdhi saṁvatsara kā¨rttika ba 5 lu paṭṭābhiṣēkastulayi Abhayahasta rāyasamu yicci śaraṇāgatulai vaccina nuggihaḷli rāyaṇarāju Uṁmattūru mallurāju veṁkaṭādri mōdalayina pāḷeyāru nāyakula pāliṁcci bhūgatulayi Uṁḍagā maṁnyulanu rakṣiṁci tiruvaḍi rājyānaku manyula daḷa vāṁḍlaṁ pāliṁci Aṁpa navadhariṁ
ṁ ci tiruvaḍicāta kappaṁ puccukoni pāṁḍirāju komā¨rttenuṁ puccukoni tāṁbhrapa¨rnni tīrānanu jayastaṁbhaṁ vēsi tuṁbiccināyaninni sāḷuvanāyaninni Ājñaveṭṭi naṁdana saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 12 Ā lu Accutarāyamahārāyalunnu veradādēvaṁma komāra veṁkkaṭādri cikkavoḍayalunnu varadarājula sēviṁci varadarājadēvara sannidhini mutyāla tulāpuruṣalu 2ḍki navadhariṁci mahābhūtaghaṭadānamunnu sahasra gōdānamunnu śēśi varadarāja dēvaraku sama¨rpiṁcina virōdhi saṁvatsara kā¨rtikamāsaṁ mōdalu naṁdana saṁvetsaraṁ Āṣāḍhamāsa niruddhānaku kānikeṁgā sama¨rpiṁcina ga 415 naivēdyānaku sama¨rpiṁcina 150 Ubhayaṁ ga 565 pitāṁbara 1 ki taṭṭu 1 kinni ceṟagulu 2 kinni tirumaharāla kiccina
ṁ pūvu 54 kinni keṁpulu 1055 vajrālu 700 vaiḍū¨ryyālu 12 nīlālu 1 prāta māṇika 1 paccapo¨rḷlu 9 puṣyarāgaṁ 1 māṁdoya pacca 91 mutyālu 1107 nnu sahā tūnika 3019 padakaṁ 1 ki tirugu vārāṁ gaṭṭina vajrālu 89 nāyaka keṁpu 1 padakānaṁ gaṭṭina keṁpu 4 pedda mutyālu 1 sahā padaka 1 ki tūṁka 100 nāṇayamaina paṭṭu paccaḍālu 10 nāṇayamaina paṭṭucīralu 11 bhaṁgāru pāṁta paccaḍālu 10 bhaṁgāru pāṁta cīralu 3 maṁcaṣṭi cīralu 2 gaṁdhapucakkalu 13 ki palaṁ 681 ka¨rpūra kudiraṁ 4 kaṇaṁculu 36 kastūri kaṇaṁcu 51 kuṁkuma man 1 ki kaṇaṁcu 4 malākācū ḍanka tūnike 203 pannīruceṁbu 10 r palaṁ 405 Avasara ceṟavu naivēdyānaku
ṁ kaṭṭaḷaku sama¨rpiṁcina śiyapuraṁ kuppaṁ mōdalugānu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 400 maṁṇūru kuppaṁ mōdalugānu grāmaṁ 3 ki ga 150 Akkāḷivelūru kuppaṁ mōdalugānu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 300 puḷiyaṁbākaṁ 1 ki ga 40 veṇakuḍigrāmaṁ 1 ki ga 33 tiruveṇakāraṇaigrāmaṁ 1 ki ga 100 maṇal pākaṁ grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 30 pākaṁgrāmaṁ 1 ki ga 10 viruparāyapēṭa grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 70 puṁci grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 70 Eḍuveripaṭṭu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 12 murukaṁ tāṁgalugrāmaṁ 1 ki ga 8 malepaṭṭu yiruṁguḷaṁ vallān peruṁterugrāmaṁ 1 ki ga 87 merai Akaraṁ grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 25 cavukaigrāmaṁ 1 ki ga 5 Āveraśi grāmālu 17 ki ga 1500 ki kaṭṭaḷla śēśina dinaṁ 1 ki sannidhi dīpālu 50 ki nūne nā 2 Ø Āraggiṁpuku vaśyālu 57 ki Amudupaḍika 4Ø2 neyi nā 2 pesalu 71 bellaṁ
ṁ nā Ø teṁkāyalu 4 kaṟiyamudu tāḷiṁpanū neyi vuḷaku miriyālu Āḷāku vuppu nā 1 dadhyōdanapaḷyālu 2 ki rājana Āmudupaḍi Þ2 tayiramudu Þ2 neyi vuḷaku pasavu Āḷāku soṁṭi Āḷāku Elaṁ Āḷāku Āvālu vuḷaku paccaḷḷu tiruvottaśāmaṁ paḷyālu 2 ki rājana Amudupaḍi ?71 pāl ?71 neyi vuḷaku paṁcadāra nā 1 Araṁṭipaṁḍlu 8 teṁkāyalu 2 kaṟiyamudu Atirasapaḷlu 2 ki Amudupaḍi 1 ki neyyi Þ7 2Ø bellaṁ ka Ø0 miriyaṁjari jīrakaṁ vuḷaku Elaṁ vuḷaku yiṁduku Āragiṁcina prasādaṁ ka 4Ø0 dadyō danaṁ ?72 tiruvattiśāmaṁ ?71 Atirasaṁ 102 yiṁduku pātraśēṣaṁ muṟaikāṟakaṁ kaṭṭaḷla paḍipoṁgānu viṭṭavanviḷukāḍu nālokapālu naḍavaṁgalavāru migilinavi nāThere is a
lu vaga viḷukāḍu paṁcukōṁgalavāru .
Digital edition of SII 16.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
